reviews.comment:
Todo lo que uno espera de una YPF en Argentina. Muy limpio el baño (se agradece cuando uno viene viajando) y muy completo el C-Store (YPF Full).

(Translated by Google)
Everything you'd expect from a YPF station in Argentina. The bathroom was very clean (a plus when you're traveling) and the convenience store (YPF Full) was very well-stocked.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKOUo2WmRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Son desatentos y lentos en la atención de los surtidores de combustible. Ni si quiera el parabrisas te ofrecen de limpiar

(Translated by Google)
They're inattentive and slow at the fuel pumps. They don't even offer to clean your windshield.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Roberto. Lamentamos que no hayas tenido una buena experiencia
